name: Vermont Cheddar and Maple Crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the shredded cheddar, chopped pecans, mayonnaise, maple syrup, and Worcestershire sauce in a medium-sized bowl.
2. Spread the mixture evenly on the crackers using rounded teaspoonfuls.
3. Place the crackers on a flat pan or cookie sheet.
4. Broil under until the cheese is melted and bubbling.
5. Transfer to a plate and serve at once. Makes 3 dozen puffs.
